case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. FKA BANK OF AMERICA VS. STEVE BOVERIE

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT GAVE MR. BOVERIE AN OPPORTUNITY TO STATE HIS OPPOSITION IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. FKA BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED.
